descriptions.constants_list-contribution-item-types: List the official LD-203 contribution item type constants. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs used to interpret contribution_items.contribution_type values in contribution reports.
descriptions.constants_list-countries: List country constants accepted by LDA.gov filters and returned in client, registrant, and contribution address fields. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs for normalizing country values.
descriptions.constants_list-filing-types: List official filing type constants for LDA reports, including original and amended filing codes. No parameters are required. Use this before filtering filings or contribution reports by filing_type.
descriptions.constants_list-government-entities: List official government entity constants referenced by lobbying activity disclosures. No parameters are required. Returns entity IDs and names for interpreting government_entities in filing records.
descriptions.constants_list-lobbying-activity-general: List official general issue codes used in lobbying activity disclosures. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs for filtering filings by issue and decoding lobbying_activities.general_issue_code.
descriptions.constants_list-lobbyist-prefixes: List allowed lobbyist name prefix constants such as honorifics. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs used when normalizing lobbyist records.
descriptions.constants_list-lobbyist-suffixes: List allowed lobbyist name suffix constants such as professional or generational suffixes. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs used when normalizing lobbyist records.
descriptions.constants_list-states: List state and territory constants accepted by LDA.gov filters and returned in address fields. No parameters are required. Returns code/name pairs for normalizing client, registrant, and contribution locations.
